summary.environment: Next.js 16.2.6 static build, Chromium via Playwright MCP

performance.note: Static SSG site — no server computation. Performance testing not applicable.

owasp_checks.notes: Static page, no auth, no protected resources
No data storage or transmission of sensitive data
No user input rendered; email/socials from hardcoded lib/site.ts
Direct mailto: link — no data collection, no form submission
All target=_blank links have rel=noopener noreferrer; external URLs use HTTPS
Next.js 16.2.6 is recent stable; no known CVEs at time of test
No auth flow in contact section

owasp_checks.category: A08:2021 Software and Data Integrity Failures
owasp_checks.notes: Static build, no dynamic imports in contact component

owasp_checks.category: A09:2021 Security Logging and Monitoring Failures
owasp_checks.notes: Portfolio static site; no logging required
No server-side HTTP requests in contact section

test_cases.notes: id=contact, aria-labelledby=contact-heading, h2 id=contact-heading all present. Accessibility tree shows region 'Get in Touch'.

test_cases.description: Email CTA computed styles at desktop 1440px
test_cases.notes: color: rgb(212,175,55)=#d4af37 ✓ | fontSize: 18px ✓ | fontFamily: JetBrains Mono ✓ | href: mailto:oscarmdzgarcia@gmail.com ✓ | height: 44px (touch target) ✓ | minHeight: 44px ✓

test_cases.description: Social links data, attributes, and styles
test_cases.notes: 3 links (GitHub, LinkedIn, X) ✓ | target=_blank ✓ | rel=noopener noreferrer ✓ | color: rgb(153,153,153) ✓ | fontSize: 14px ✓ | fontFamily: JetBrains Mono ✓ | height: 44px each ✓
FAIL: headingFontSize=24px, wireframe spec=28px. All other values pass: paddingTop/Bottom=80px ✓ | paddingH=24px ✓ | scrollMarginTop=64px ✓ | no horizontal scroll ✓. See BUG-002.
outlineStyle: solid ✓ | outlineWidth: 2px ✓ | outlineColor: rgb(212,175,55)=#d4af37 ✓ | outlineOffset: 2px ✓. Screenshot captured: focus-ring-email.png.
Navigated to http://localhost:4321/#contact. Section.top=168.75px (within viewport). inViewport=true ✓
4 links in DOM order: email → GitHub → LinkedIn → X. All tabIndex=0 ✓. Correct visual order (email first, then socials) ✓.

test_cases.description: Reduced-motion CSS coverage for link transitions
test_cases.notes: FAIL: Only prefers-reduced-motion rule found: html { scroll-behavior: auto }. Link transitions (color 0.2s) are NOT disabled under prefers-reduced-motion:reduce. Wireframe spec requires transitions disabled. See BUG-001.

test_cases.description: Mobile heading font size matches wireframe spec (28px)
test_cases.notes: FAIL: text-2xl renders 24px. Wireframe specifies 28px (4px deviation). Low severity; page is readable. See BUG-002.
At 768px: lg: breakpoint not applied (correct, lg=1024px). headingFontSize=24px, paddingTop=80px. Content readable, no horizontal scroll ✓. Noted as Low deviation — see BUG-003.

test_cases.description: External links: rel=noopener noreferrer on all target=_blank
test_cases.notes: All 3 social links have rel=noopener noreferrer ✓. OWASP A05 check passed.

test_cases.description: No injection surface — all content from static source
test_cases.notes: Email and socials sourced from lib/site.ts (build-time constant). No user input, no innerHTML with dynamic content. XSS risk: none.
Screenshot captured. Heading white #f5f5f5, email gold #d4af37 mono, divider visible, social links muted secondary. Footer directly below section without gap. Design matches wireframe ✓.
Screenshot captured. Email CTA dominant, social links inline (GitHub LinkedIn X on one line), footer visible. No horizontal scroll. Layout correct ✓.
Screenshot captured. Section readable, no overflow, email gold, social links visible, footer present. Minor: desktop padding/heading not applied at this breakpoint (BUG-003).
hr[aria-hidden=true] present ✓. Separator does not pollute accessibility tree.
Container: role=list, aria-label='Social profiles' ✓. Each social link: role=listitem ✓. Accessibility tree snapshot confirms 'list Social profiles' with 3 listitems.
